d.t: Tìm quán cà phê gần đây

e.p: Can you recommend a coffee shop near here?
e.m: Nói tên quán bạn gợi ý. Nói nó ở đâu (một vị trí gần).
e.h: Use: [Name] + is + near + place.
e.s: The Corner Cafe is a good coffee shop. It is near the city park.

e.p: I want a quiet place to work. Any idea?
e.m: Nói tên một quán yên tĩnh. Nói bạn thích nó vì yên tĩnh / có wi‑fi.
e.h: Use: I like + it because + reason.
e.s: The Study Bean is quiet. I like it because it has good Wi‑Fi.

e.p: Where do locals often go for coffee?
e.m: Nói một quán phổ biến. Nói nó thường đông vào lúc nào (morning/afternoon).
e.h: Use: often + verb (go/goes) or It is + busy + time.
e.s: Local people often go to Sunrise Cafe. It is busy in the morning.

e.p: Do you know a cheap coffee place around?
e.m: Nói tên quán rẻ. Nói một tính từ ngắn mô tả giá (cheap/affordable).
e.h: Use: It is + adjective (cheap/affordable).
e.s: Budget Brew is a cheap coffee place. It is affordable and good.

e.p: I'm going to meet a friend. Which coffee shop is near the station?
e.m: Nói tên quán gần ga. Nói nó dễ tìm (one short direction or landmark).
e.h: Use: It is near + landmark or next to + place.
e.s: Station Espresso is near the train station. It is next to the ticket office.

d.t: Gợi ý nhà hàng cho du khách

e.p: What's a good local restaurant here?
e.m: Nói tên nhà hàng. Nói một lý do ngắn tại sao (food/taste).
e.h: Use: [Name] + is + good because + reason.
e.s: Green Garden is a good local restaurant. It is good because the food is fresh.

e.p: I want to try local food tonight. Any suggestion?
e.m: Nói tên món hoặc nhà hàng. Nói bạn thích món vì một lý do ngắn.
e.h: Use: I like + N / I want + to V.
e.s: Try the River Grill for local dishes. I want the grilled fish because it is tasty.

e.p: Is there a cheap place to eat near the market?
e.m: Nói tên quán rẻ gần chợ. Nói nó ở đâu (gần chợ).
e.h: Use: It is near + place / It is cheap.
e.s: Market Kitchen is a cheap place to eat. It is near the market entrance.

e.p: Do you know a restaurant for a small group of 4?
e.m: Nói tên nhà hàng phù hợp. Nói nếu có chỗ cho 4 người (one short sentence).
e.h: Use: There is/are + space / It has + number + seats.
e.s: Family Table is good for a group. It has enough seats for four people.

e.p: My friend is vegetarian. Any restaurant for them?
e.m: Nói tên nhà hàng có món chay. Nói vì sao phù hợp (has vegetarian food).
e.h: Use: It has + vegetarian + food / It is + suitable.
e.s: Sunrise Deli has vegetarian options. It is suitable for your friend.

d.t: Hoạt động ngoài trời cuối tuần

e.p: What can I do outdoors this weekend?
e.m: Đề xuất một hoạt động ngoài trời. Nói nơi hoạt động diễn ra (park/river/etc.).
e.h: Use: You can + V / It is + at + place.
e.s: You can go for a walk in Riverside Park. It is by the river.

e.p: Is there a good hiking trail nearby?
e.m: Nói tên đường mòn hoặc khu đi bộ. Nói nó ở đâu (near something).
e.h: Use: There is + a + trail + near + place.
e.s: There is a nice trail at Hillwood. It is near the old museum.

e.p: I want something fun for kids. Any outdoor idea?
e.m: Nói một hoạt động cho trẻ con. Nói nơi hoặc tiện ích (playground).
e.h: Use: It has + playground / Kids can + V.
e.s: Try Sunny Park for kids. It has a big playground and kids can play safely.

e.p: Is it safe to swim in the lake?
e.m: Nói nếu an toàn (yes/no). Nói lý do ngắn (water quality/guard).
e.h: Use: It is safe / It is not safe because + reason.
e.s: It is not safe to swim in the lake. There is no lifeguard and the water is murky.

e.p: Can I rent a bike nearby for a city ride?
e.m: Nói nơi thuê xe đạp. Nói nếu nó rẻ hoặc có sẵn (one short note).
e.h: Use: You can rent + at + place / It is + cheap/available.
e.s: You can rent a bike at City Bikes. It is affordable and always available on weekends.

d.t: Địa điểm ăn nhẹ và tráng miệng

e.p: Where can I find good ice cream here?
e.m: Nói tên quán kem. Nói bạn thích hương vị gì (one flavor).
e.h: Use: [Name] + has + flavor / I like + flavor.
e.s: Cream & Joy has good ice cream. I like the mango flavor there.

e.p: Any place for a quick snack near the cinema?
e.m: Nói tên quán ăn nhẹ gần rạp. Nói nó ở đâu (near cinema).
e.h: Use: It is near + place / It is quick.
e.s: Snack Stop is near the cinema. It is quick and tasty.

e.p: I'm hungry now. Is there a bakery open?
e.m: Nói tên tiệm bánh. Nói nếu nó mở bây giờ (yes/no).
e.h: Use: It is open / It is closed / right now.
e.s: Morning Bread bakery is open now. It opens early every day.

e.p: Do locals like the dessert at Blue Cafe?
e.m: Nói ý kiến chung (yes/no). Nói lý do ngắn (sweet/tasty).
e.h: Use: Yes, they do. It is + adjective.
e.s: Yes, locals like the dessert at Blue Cafe. It is very sweet and tasty.

e.p: Can you suggest a place for afternoon tea?
e.m: Nói tên quán trà. Nói một điều ngắn về không khí (quiet/pretty).
e.h: Use: It is + adjective (quiet/pretty).
e.s: The Tea House is a nice place for afternoon tea. It is quiet and pretty.

d.t: Hoạt động buổi tối trong thành phố

e.p: What is fun to do in the city tonight?
e.m: Đề xuất một hoạt động tối (movie/market). Nói nơi diễn ra.
e.h: Use: You can + V at + place.
e.s: You can watch a movie at Central Cinema. It is open late tonight.

e.p: Are there any night markets nearby?
e.m: Nói nếu có (yes/no). Nói một chợ cụ thể và vị trí ngắn.
e.h: Use: There is/are + market + near + place.
e.s: Yes, there is a night market on River Road. It is near the old bridge.

e.p: I like live music. Any bars with music?
e.m: Nói tên quán có nhạc sống. Nói nó thường có nhạc vào ngày nào (e.g., Friday).
e.h: Use: It often has + live music + on + day.
e.s: The Blue Note often has live music on Fridays. It is a small cozy bar.

e.p: Is it safe to walk alone at night here?
e.m: Nói nếu an toàn (yes/no). Nói một lời khuyên ngắn (avoid/ stay in lit areas).
e.h: Use: It is safe / It is not safe + because + reason.
e.s: It is mostly safe to walk at night. But avoid dark alleys and stay on main streets.

e.p: I want a quiet cafe open late. Any suggestion?
e.m: Nói tên quán mở muộn và yên tĩnh. Nói nó ở đâu (short location).
e.h: Use: It is open late and + adjective.
e.s: Night Owl Cafe is open late and quiet. It is near the central library.

d.t: Các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng

e.p: What is the main tourist spot in this city?
e.m: Nói tên điểm tham quan chính. Nói nó ở đâu (center/near river).
e.h: Use: [Name] + is + at/in + place.
e.s: The Old Fort is the main tourist spot. It is by the river in the city center.

e.p: How many museums are in the city center?
e.m: Nói số lượng (one short number). Nói một ví dụ về tên bảo tàng.
e.h: Use: There are + number + museums / One is + name.
e.s: There are two museums in the city center. One is the City History Museum.

e.p: Is the park good for a small picnic?
e.m: Nói có/không. Nói lý do ngắn (big/quiet/clean).
e.h: Use: Yes, it is + because + reason or No, it is not + reason.
e.s: Yes, the park is good for a picnic. It is big and very clean.

e.p: Can I see the viewpoint by walking?
e.m: Nói có thể đi bộ hay không. Nói thời gian đi bộ ngắn (approx).
e.h: Use: You can walk / It takes + time.
e.s: You can walk to the viewpoint. It takes about twenty minutes from here.

e.p: Are there guided tours for the historic area?
e.m: Nói có/không. Nói khi nào thường có tour (daily/weekends).
e.h: Use: Yes, there are + tours + on + day/time.
e.s: Yes, there are guided tours for the historic area. They run every weekend.

d.t: Gợi ý cho gia đình có trẻ em

e.p: Where can children play safely here?
e.m: Nói một địa điểm cho trẻ chơi. Nói một lý do (safe/has playground).
e.h: Use: It has + playground / It is + safe.
e.s: Happy Park is a good place for children. It has a secure playground and is safe.

e.p: Any family restaurants with kids menu?
e.m: Nói tên nhà hàng có menu cho trẻ. Nói một điều ngắn về menu (simple/cheap).
e.h: Use: It has + a kids menu / It is + adjective.
e.s: Little Spoon has a kids menu. It is simple and affordable.

e.p: Is there a children's museum in town?
e.m: Nói có/không. Nói tên hoặc vị trí ngắn nếu có.
e.h: Use: There is + a + museum + at/in + place.
e.s: Yes, there is a children's museum downtown. It is next to the library.

e.p: Can we rent a stroller near the park?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nói nơi thuê nếu có (shop name or desk).
e.h: Use: You can rent + at + place / It is available.
e.s: You can rent a stroller at Park Services. It is available at the main desk.

e.p: What quiet activity is good for toddlers here?
e.m: Đề xuất một hoạt động yên tĩnh cho trẻ nhỏ. Nói địa điểm ngắn.
e.h: Use: You can + V + at + place / It is + adjective.
e.s: You can visit the Story Corner for toddlers. It is quiet and cozy.

d.t: Mua sắm và chợ địa phương

e.p: Where is the nearest market?
e.m: Nói tên chợ gần nhất. Nói nó ở đâu (one short location).
e.h: Use: The nearest market is + name + at/in + place.
e.s: The nearest market is Central Market. It is at Main Street, near the bridge.

e.p: Are there good local souvenirs to buy?
e.m: Nói có/không. Nói một món quà ngắn gọn (one item).
e.h: Use: Yes, there are + items / One is + item.
e.s: Yes, there are good local souvenirs. One is handmade pottery from the market.

e.p: I need fresh fruit. Where should I go?
e.m: Gợi ý một nơi bán hoa quả tươi. Nói nó ở đâu (market/stand).
e.h: Use: Go to + place / It is near + landmark.
e.s: Go to the fruit stalls at Central Market. They are near the main entrance.

e.p: Is bargaining common at the local market?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nói một lời khuyên ngắn nếu có (try to bargain).
e.h: Use: Yes, it is common / Try + to V.
e.s: Yes, bargaining is common at the local market. Try to ask for a lower price politely.

e.p: Can I buy clothes at a small shop nearby?
e.m: Nói một cửa hàng quần áo gần đó. Nói nếu giá rẻ hay không (short).
e.h: Use: It is + cheap/affordable/expensive.
e.s: There is a small clothing shop on Market Lane. It is affordable for casual clothes.

d.t: Đi lại và chỉ đường đơn giản

e.p: How do I get to the museum from here?
e.m: Nói một hướng đơn giản (walk/take bus). Nói thời gian ước tính ngắn.
e.h: Use: Walk + time / Take + bus + and it takes + time.
e.s: Walk straight for ten minutes to the museum. It is on the left after the bakery.

e.p: Is there a bus to the beach?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nói số bus hoặc nơi đón (one short detail).
e.h: Use: Yes, take + bus number / It stops at + place.
e.s: Yes, take bus number 5 to the beach. It stops at the seaside station.

e.p: Can I walk to the city center?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nói thời gian đi bộ (approx).
e.h: Use: You can walk / It takes + about + minutes.
e.s: You can walk to the city center. It takes about twenty minutes on foot.

e.p: Where is the nearest taxi stand?
e.m: Nói vị trí quầy taxi gần nhất. Nói nếu nó thường có taxi sẵn (yes/no).
e.h: Use: It is at + place / There are usually + taxis.
e.s: The nearest taxi stand is at Central Square. There are usually taxis there.

e.p: How much is a short taxi ride to the park?
e.m: Nói giá ước tính ngắn (cheap/moderate). Nói nếu nó nhanh (short time).
e.h: Use: It costs + about + money or It is + cheap/moderate.
e.s: A short taxi ride to the park costs about five dollars. It is quick and cheap.

e.p: Which is better for lunch, Market Cafe or River Bistro?
e.m: Nói địa điểm bạn chọn. Nói một lý do ngắn (price/taste/ambience).
e.h: Use: I prefer + place because + reason.
e.s: I prefer River Bistro for lunch. I like it because the food is fresh and tasty.

e.p: Is the park or the plaza better for photos?
e.m: Chọn một nơi. Nói một lý do ngắn (scenery/light).
e.h: Use: The + place + is better because + reason.
e.s: The park is better for photos. It has pretty trees and good light.

e.p: Which is cheaper, the food court or the small restaurant?
e.m: Nói nơi rẻ hơn. Nói một mô tả ngắn về giá.
e.h: Use: [Place] is cheaper. It is + adjective (affordable).
e.s: The food court is cheaper than the small restaurant. It is more affordable.

e.p: Do locals prefer the old cafe or the new one?
e.m: Nói nơi locals thích. Nói lý do ngắn (taste/tradition).
e.h: Use: Locals prefer + place because + reason.
e.s: Locals prefer the old cafe. They like it because of tradition and good coffee.

e.p: Which place is quieter, Library Cafe or Main Street Cafe?
e.m: Chọn nơi yên tĩnh hơn. Nói một mô tả ngắn về không khí.
e.h: Use: [Place] is quieter. It is + adjective.
e.s: Library Cafe is quieter than Main Street Cafe. It is calm and peaceful.

d.t: Hủy / đổi đặt chỗ và giải pháp

e.p: I need to cancel a restaurant booking. What should I do?
e.m: Nói hành động cần làm (call/online). Nói thông tin cần nêu (name/time).
e.h: Use: Call + the + place / Say + name and time.
e.s: Call the restaurant to cancel your booking. Tell them your name and booking time.

e.p: My tour is full. Can I change the date?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nói cách thay đổi (ask at office / online).
e.h: Use: Yes, you can + or No, you cannot + and then + action.
e.s: Yes, you can change the date for your tour. Ask at the tour office or book online.

e.p: The cafe lost my reservation. What do I say?
e.m: Nói một câu ngắn để yêu cầu kiểm tra. Nói tên/giờ bạn đã đặt.
e.h: Use: Please check + my reservation / My name is + name and time.
e.s: Please check my reservation again. My name is [studentName] and it was for 7 pm.

e.p: Can I get a refund if the activity is cancelled?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nói nơi hoặc cách lấy tiền hoàn (office/website).
e.h: Use: Yes, you can + at + place / It depends + on + policy.
e.s: Yes, you can get a refund if the activity is cancelled. Ask at the ticket office for details.

e.p: I arrive late for my booking. Can they wait?
e.m: Nói nên làm gì (call/send message). Nói nếu thường được chờ (short).
e.h: Use: Call + them / They usually wait + time.
e.s: Call them to say you are running late. They usually wait for ten minutes.

d.t: Lên kế hoạch cho một ngày tham quan

e.p: I have one day in the city. What should I see first?
e.m: Gợi ý một điểm tham quan đầu tiên. Nói lý do ngắn (popular/near).
e.h: Use: Start at + place because + reason.
e.s: Start at the Old Fort because it is the most popular spot. It is near many cafes.

e.p: How many places can I visit in a day?
e.m: Nói số lượng hợp lý. Nói ví dụ ngắn về hai nơi bạn đề xuất.
e.h: Use: You can visit + number + places / e.g., + place and + place.
e.s: You can visit three or four places in a day. For example, the fort and the city museum.

e.p: Where to eat between visits?
e.m: Gợi ý một nhà hàng hoặc quán ăn trung gian. Nói vì sao tiện (nearby/quick).
e.h: Use: Eat at + place / It is near + place and quick.
e.s: Eat at Market Kitchen between visits. It is nearby and quick.

e.p: Can I use public transport for the whole day?
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nói một lời khuyên ngắn về vé (buy a day pass).
e.h: Use: Yes, you can + and buy + day pass / It is cheaper.
e.s: Yes, you can use public transport all day. Buy a day pass because it is cheaper.

e.p: Is it better to walk or take the bus for a city tour?
e.m: Chọn walk hoặc bus. Nói một lý do ngắn (see more/fast).
e.h: Use: Walking is better because + reason or Bus is better because + reason.
e.s: Walking is better to see more of the city. It is slow but you see many small streets.

d.t: Ôn tập: Gợi ý nhanh cho khách

e.p: A tourist asks: 'Good cafe nearby?' How do you answer?
e.m: Nói tên một quán gần. Nói một lý do ngắn (good/tasty/near).
e.h: Use: [Name] + is + near + place / It is + adjective.
e.s: Try River Cafe. It is near the bridge and the coffee is good.

e.p: They ask 'Cheap dinner place?' What's your reply?
e.m: Nói tên một quán rẻ. Nói một mô tả ngắn về giá hoặc đồ ăn.
e.h: Use: [Place] is cheap. It has + food type.
e.s: Try Market Bowl for a cheap dinner. It has simple local dishes.

e.p: Guest asks 'How to get to museum fast?'
e.m: Cho hướng ngắn nhất (walk/bus). Nói thời gian ước tính.
e.h: Use: Walk + time or Take + bus + and it takes + time.
e.s: Walk straight for ten minutes to reach the museum. It is the fastest way.

e.p: They want a quiet evening spot. What do you say?
e.m: Nói một quán yên tĩnh. Nói có mở muộn hay không.
e.h: Use: [Place] is quiet and (open late / not open late).
e.s: Quiet Corner is a peaceful evening spot. It is open late tonight.

e.p: Tourist: 'Any family activity today?'
e.m: Đề xuất một hoạt động cho gia đình. Nói nơi ngắn.
e.h: Use: You can + V at + place / It is + adjective.
e.s: You can visit the children's museum today. It is fun and educational for kids.

d.t: Ôn tập: Lên lịch và đặt chỗ

e.p: A guest asks to book a table tonight. What do you advise?
e.m: Nói hành động: book by phone/online. Nói thông tin cần có (time/name).
e.h: Use: Call + the + place / Give + name and time.
e.s: Call the restaurant now to book a table. Give them your name and arrival time.

e.p: They ask 'Can I change my tour time?'
e.m: Trả lời có/không. Nói nơi hoặc cách thay đổi (office/website).
e.h: Use: Yes, you can + or No, you cannot + then + action.
e.s: Yes, you can change your tour time. Contact the tour office to reschedule.

e.p: Guest: 'My booking is at 6 but I'm late.'
e.m: Nói nên làm gì (call/ask to wait). Nói thời gian họ có thể chờ (short).
e.h: Use: Call them / They usually wait + minutes.
e.s: Call the place and tell them you are late. They usually wait for ten minutes.

e.p: They need a family table for four tomorrow. Any tip?
e.m: Nói nên đặt trước. Nói một cách đặt (phone/online).
e.h: Use: You should + V / Book + by + phone/online.
e.s: You should book a family table in advance. Book online or call the restaurant.

e.p: Guest asks about refund rules for cancelled tickets.
e.m: Nói nơi họ hỏi (ticket office). Nói ngắn về khả năng hoàn tiền (yes/depends).
e.h: Use: Ask at + place / It depends on + policy.
e.s: Ask at the ticket office for refund rules. It depends on the event's policy.

d.t: Ôn tập: Giải quyết vấn đề tại địa phương

e.p: A visitor lost their bag at the cafe. What to tell them?
e.m: Nói họ nên làm gì ngay (ask staff). Nói nơi trả đồ (lost & found).
e.h: Use: Ask + the + staff / Check + lost and found.
e.s: Ask the cafe staff right away. Check the lost and found at the front desk.

e.p: They complain the food is cold. How to respond?
e.m: Gợi ý yêu cầu đổi hoặc hâm nóng. Nói hành động ngắn (ask staff).
e.h: Use: Ask for + replacement or warming / Say + it is cold.
e.s: Ask the staff to warm or replace the dish. Tell them the food is cold.

e.p: Their bus was cancelled. What are options?
e.m: Đề xuất hai lựa chọn ngắn (take another bus/taxi). Nói ưu điểm ngắn của mỗi lựa chọn.
e.h: Use: You can + V or You can + V. Give short reason.
e.s: You can take the next bus which is cheaper. Or you can take a taxi which is faster.

e.p: A guest can't find their hotel. What do you advise?
e.m: Nói điền thông tin: check address or ask a taxi. Nói một bước ngắn tiếp theo.
e.h: Use: Check the address / Ask a taxi driver.
e.s: Check the hotel's address and phone number. If needed, ask a taxi driver to help.

e.p: They lost phone signal. Any simple help?
e.m: Đề xuất một giải pháp nhanh (move to open area / use Wi‑Fi). Nói nơi để dùng Wi‑Fi.
e.h: Use: Move to + place / Use + Wi‑Fi at + place.
e.s: Move to an open area for better signal. Or use free Wi‑Fi at the nearby cafe.
